details.reasoning: Implementation is well-structured with most requirements met: package.json has correct @openclaw/pulseboard name and setupEntry field, openclaw.plugin.json exists with channels and configSchema, channel.ts uses createChatChannelPlugin with correct chatTypes ["direct", "group"], textChunkLimit of 4000, outbound sendText/gateway/messaging capabilities, and normalizeTarget function. Index.ts and setup-entry.ts correctly use defineChannelPluginEntry and defineSetupPluginEntry. All new files are in pulseboard directory with no modifications to existing files. However, the diff is truncated and does not show complete contents of critical files (types.ts, runtime.ts, runtime-api.ts). The visible code shows apiUrl/apiKey field names being used instead of the rubric's specified boardUrl/apiToken, suggesting possible field naming discrepancies. Cannot fully verify runtime store with createPluginRuntimeStore and get/set accessors, or complete type definitions for PulseBoardAccount/PulseBoardConfig/PulseBoardMessage with required fields.
